transcript: Speaker A: What happened? Speaker B: This outfit is matching with this new earrings? Speaker C: Ritu, ithu thettaya English aanu, ingane parayoo, "Does this outfit match these earrings?" [Ritu, this is incorrect English, say it like this, "Does this outfit match these earrings?"] Speaker B: Okay. Does this outfit match with this new earrings? Speaker C: Perfect. Speaker B: ithu valare easy aayirunnu. [This was very easy.] Speaker C: English padikkan valare easy aanu. [Learning English is very easy.] Speaker B: Randu muthal maasam aayi English padikkan try cheyyunnu, pakshe enne kondu kazhiyunnulla. [I've been trying to learn English for two to three months, but I can't do it.] Speaker C: Nee SpeakX app try cheyyu. [You try the SpeakX app.] Speaker B: SpeakX app? Speaker C: Ithu oru AI English teaching app aanu. Ivide ente pole AI teachers English samsarikkan padippikkukayum practice cheyyikkukayum cheyyum. Nee ennodu enthengilum chodikku, njan athinte English paranju tharum, pinne athu practice cheyyikkum. Thettayi paranjal correct cheyyum, oru real human teacher pole. Nithyam pathu pathinanju minute ennode English samsarikkan practice cheyyu, pathinanju irupathu divasathinullil nalla fluent aayi samsarikkan padikkum. [This is an AI English teaching app. Here, AI teachers like me will teach and practice speaking English. You ask me anything, I will tell you the English for it, and then make you practice. If you say it wrong, I will correct it, like a real human teacher. Practice speaking English with me for 10-15 minutes daily, and you will learn to speak fluently within 15-20 days.] Speaker B: AI teachers undenkil expensive aayirikkum alle? [If there are AI teachers, it must be expensive, right?] Speaker C: Illa. Just naalu rupees per day il ezhu divasathe trial kittum. [No. You get a 7-day trial for just 4 rupees per day.] Speaker B: Ohhh... ithu mumbil arinjilla entha? Njan ippo thanne SpeakX app download cheyyunnu. [Oh... why didn't I know this before? I am downloading the SpeakX app right now.]

Just naalu rupees per day il ezhu divasathe trial kittum. [No. You get a 7-day trial for just 4 rupees per day.] Ohhh... ithu mumbil arinjilla entha? summary: A split-screen Malayalam advertisement features an AI avatar correcting a woman's English grammar. The AI avatar introduces the SpeakX app, explaining how it acts as a personal AI English teacher that corrects mistakes and helps users practice daily. The ad concludes with a low-cost pricing offer and a call to action to download the app.
